summary: Reviewer specialization for read-only drift, stale-name, and route-boundary inspection.
meaning: Use this specialization when the reviewer must inspect whether a change keeps source owners, route cards, generated readers, and legacy-name cleanup coherent.
activation_triggers: Legacy source names may still be active noise.
A generated reader may point at a stale source path.
A change needs review for route-law drift before landing.
projection_notes: May project as reviewer-route-drift-review, but source remains inside the reviewer role house.
Projection should be read-only and findings-first.
stop_lines: Do not land fixes through this specialization.
Do not treat a review finding as durable memory canon.
